label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's break down the problem. We have a row of three objects on a table: a grey puzzle, a gold pencil, and a yellow teddy bear. The question is asking for the color of the object directly to the right of the gold object. First, we need to determine the arrangement of the objects. The problem states they are in a row, but doesn't specify the order. So, the first thing is to figure out the possible arrangements. The three objects are: 1. A grey puzzle 2. A gold pencil 3. A yellow teddy bear Let me consider all possible permutations of these three objects in a row. There are 3! = 6 possible arrangements. 1. Grey puzzle - Gold pencil - Yellow teddy bear 2. Grey puzzle - Yellow teddy bear - Gold pencil 3. Gold pencil - Grey puzzle - Yellow teddy bear 4. Gold pencil - Yellow teddy bear - Grey puzzle 5. Yellow teddy bear - Grey puzzle - Gold pencil 6. Yellow teddy bear - Gold pencil - Grey puzzle Now, the question is about the object directly to the right of the gold object. Let's examine each arrangement: 1. Grey puzzle - Gold pencil - Yellow teddy bear - Gold object is the middle one (gold pencil) - Object to its right is the yellow teddy bear - So, the color is yellow 2. Grey puzzle - Yellow teddy bear - Gold pencil - Gold object is the last one (gold pencil) - There is no object to its right, so this case is invalid 3. Gold pencil - Grey puzzle - Yellow teddy bear - Gold object is the first one (gold pencil) - Object to its right is the grey puzzle - So, the color is grey 4. Gold pencil - Yellow teddy bear - Grey puzzle - Gold object is the first one (gold pencil) - Object to its right is the yellow teddy bear - So, the color is yellow 5. Yellow teddy bear - Grey puzzle
